summary: Addressed systems_architect REQUEST_CHANGES for M6 layered AI. Removed the unused compile-check type from the new test, fixed exactOptionalPropertyTypes failures by only including maxTraceCandidates when defined, and strengthened command parity evidence so validation now checks non-system AI command payloads against player templates while allowing only actor, commandId, expectedDay, and expectedRevision to differ. Added an explicit reviewed support-command whitelist assertion for scheduler advance-day and M6 legitimacy system support.

tests_run.result: tsc --noEmit passed; exactOptionalPropertyTypes violations are fixed.
3 test files / 6 tests passed; layered AI parity tests now assert payload-level template parity and reviewed system support commands.
Passed format:check, lint, workspace typecheck, and architecture:check.
25 test files / 191 tests passed; existing MODULE_TYPELESS_PACKAGE_JSON warning observed for tests/fixtures/deterministic-rng-worker.ts.
Passed; hello, command/query, save/load, M4, M5, and M6 Alpha Node/Worker-compatible hashes matched. M6 Alpha Node hash 260f46c3 matched Worker-compatible hash 260f46c3; terminal outcome victory.
Passed architecture:check, sim:determinism, root Vitest 40 files / 304 tests, and apps/web Vitest 1 file / 4 tests.
Task JSON valid before R2 handoff metadata update.
No whitespace errors before R2 handoff metadata update.

decisions: Kept the fix scoped to packages/sim-ai, tests, task metadata, and outbox handoff.
Did not change protocol, save-format, scheduler, RNG, sim-core, runner, UI, content, tools, docs, or dependency manifests.
Kept system support commands separate from AI/player parity and constrained them to the reviewed scheduler/legitimacy support set.
Kept task in REVIEW; did not mark ACCEPTED/CLOSED.
risks: Task remains R4 and still needs systems_architect review.
Postwar legitimacy remains system-authorized support under existing sim-core authority rules; R2 only strengthens evidence that it is whitelisted and separate from non-system AI command parity.
requested_action: Review R2 fixes for the previous lint/typecheck blockers, optional field construction, payload-level GameCommand parity assertions, and system support command whitelist evidence. If accepted, route onward per M6 review flow; do not mark ACCEPTED/CLOSED from this writer handoff alone.
